context: Tests whether the agent produces correctly structured anti-patterns with NEVER/WHY/BAD/GOOD format, covering all three original issues and adding at least one new one.

checklist.name: WHY: explanations present
checklist.description: Each NEVER statement is followed by a 'WHY:' line explaining the consequence

checklist.name: BAD code examples
checklist.description: Each anti-pattern includes a fenced BAD code block showing the incorrect pattern

checklist.name: GOOD code examples
checklist.description: Each anti-pattern includes a fenced GOOD code block showing the correct alternative

checklist.name: All 3 original issues covered
checklist.description: Secrets hardcoding, parallel dependency issues, and floating action tags are all addressed

checklist.name: At least 4 anti-patterns total
checklist.description: Section contains 4 or more distinct NEVER entries (original 3 + at least 1 new)

checklist.name: Score impact explained
checklist.description: before-after-diff.md explains which D3 signals the new content satisfies and estimates score delta
